text: Thank you to continue with the role. I would like to make the additional observation with respect to card six that the male's arms being crossed, if the female to his right pulls on his left hand or the cap, in effect turn him, his entire body toward the right. And the same is true for the female on the left. Come on, his right hand, she will turn his entire body to her side. Which uh is my interpretation of what's meant by the tangle of the arms, that the transformation occurs by pull, which attempts to turn the entity toward the left or the right-hand path with Ra comment on that observation. We have the concept of the pull towards mental polarity may well be examined in the light of what the student has all already created concerning the nature of the conscious exemplified by the male and the unconscious exemplified by the female indeed, both the prostituted and the virginal of deep minds, invite and await the reaching in this image of a transformation of mind and each of the females points the way it would go, but is not able to move, nor are the two female entities striving to do so. They are at rest of the conscious entity, holds both, and will turn itself one way or the other, or potentially backwards and forwards, rocking a first one way, then the other, and not achieving the transformation in order for the transformation of a mind to occur one principle governing the use of the deep mind must be abandoned. Shape formed by the shoulders and crossed elbows of consciousness is a shape to be associated with transformation. Indeed, you may see this shape echoed twice more in the image, each echo having its own riches to add to the impact of this complex of concepts.

I would like to make the additional observation with respect to card six that the male's arms being crossed, if the female to his right pulls on his left hand or the cap, in effect turn him, his entire body toward the right.
And the same is true for the female on the left.
Come on, his right hand, she will turn his entire body to her side.

Which uh is my interpretation of what's meant by the tangle of the arms, that the transformation occurs by pull, which attempts to turn the entity toward the left or the right-hand path with Ra comment on that observation.

We have the concept of the pull towards mental polarity may well be examined in the light of what the student has all already created concerning the nature of the conscious exemplified by the male and the unconscious exemplified by the female indeed, both the prostituted and the virginal of deep minds, invite and await the reaching in this image of a transformation of mind and each of the females points the way it would go, but is not able to move, nor are the two female entities striving to do so.

They are at rest of the conscious entity, holds both, and will turn itself one way or the other, or potentially backwards and forwards, rocking a first one way, then the other, and not achieving the transformation in order for the transformation of a mind to occur one principle governing the use of the deep mind must be abandoned.
Shape formed by the shoulders and crossed elbows of consciousness is a shape to be associated with transformation.
Indeed, you may see this shape echoed twice more in the image, each echo having its own riches to add to the impact of this complex of concepts.
